scope: Exact two-tone and exterior-decor paint schemes transcribed from the reviewed 1977-1981 and 1983-1999 official Suburban charts. Scheme components preserve source placement roles and are not standalone color-availability assertions.

component_roles.primary: The source chart's primary paint placement for the recorded scheme.
component_roles.secondary: The source chart's secondary paint placement for the recorded scheme; this role does not establish standalone paint availability.

defaults.source_note: The stripe-color column prints a dash for every row.

rows: Dk. Blue, Garnet, Saddle, Slate Gray
Source plainly prints 76 Fire Red in this row while the same-year swatch and ZY1 table print 74 Fire Red; preserved without correction.
